caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on the topic of rural community food systems, specifically focusing on retailers willing to source local and sustainable products. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a computer screen, which shows a complex diagram with various interconnected nodes representing different aspects of the food system. The presenter navigates through this diagram, highlighting specific sections such as "13R Retailers willing to source local & Product Cost Price." The video then transitions to a new version labeled "Version X," which lists key determinants of equity and distributed impacts, including local sustainability, availability, potential local factors, deterrent rules and regulations, and disinformation campaigns. The overall focus seems to be on understanding the relationships and dynamics within the rural food system and identifying leverage points for positive change.
